title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at MedPlus South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at MedPlus South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, MedPlus South Asia Partners in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MedPlus South Asia Partners:
MedPlus South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus South Asia Partners!
